title: Tracker app fixes for auth hub handoff
body:
Tracker auth hub handoff: session routes, protected kanban, hub launcher, and autopairing flow.

## What shipped

- Auth/Tracker refactor (`801f1e2`) — hub session wiring and protected shell
- Auto pairing fixes (`742f086`, `1e3e3cf`, `574a84c`) — `/settings/auth/pair?code=` flow
- Auth session fixes (`988f4e6`)

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`574a84c`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/574a84c)
- **Completed:** 2026-06-03

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4
- **Workstream:** `tracker-implementation`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-tracker-ship`

subtasks.text: Hub session routes and protected kanban shell
